# QA Checklist (release / feature gating)

- [ ] Acceptance criteria defined and linked in issue/PR
- [ ] Unit tests added or updated for new logic
- [ ] Integration tests for cross-service flows exist
- [ ] E2E smoke tests updated (or risk acknowledged)
- [ ] Regression tests considered for impacted areas
- [ ] Accessibility checks completed for UI changes
- [ ] Test data and environment prepared for release verification
- [ ] QA sign-off (name & date)
- [ ] Known issues documented and communicated
